articles.title: La Carrera de la IA es un Ciclo
articles.summary: Bitcoin cycle framework + Perplexity Computer como ganador del ciclo de agentes. Riesgos expandidos. Teaser a Art. 5.

articles.title: Cómo Construí Mi Sistema Operativo
articles.summary: La operación interna de EVEN — Perplexity + Manus + Luis como equipo de 3. Reescrito con enfoque más personal.
articles.notes: Rewritten in prior session. Pending GitHub push.

articles.title: El Open Source Se Va a Comer al Closed Source
articles.summary: Por qué open source gana en AI — DeepSeek, Llama, el patrón de Linux repitiéndose.
articles.notes: Research data gathered: MMLU gap closed to zero, coding gap remains (SWE-bench), DeepSeek V4 50x cheaper than Claude, open source market $35-56B. Rewrite in progress.

articles.title: Por Qué Construimos Diferente
articles.summary: La filosofía de EVEN — construir diferente. Small-team economics + real cost data.
articles.notes: Research data gathered: AI-native agencies 60-80% cheaper, traditional redesign $42.5K vs AI-native $8-25K, solo founders 36.3%, 10-50x capital efficiency. Rewrite in progress.

articles.title: ¿Los Gigantes Mandan?
articles.subtitle: Apple, el silencio calculado, y lo que viene en WWDC 2026
articles.summary: REWRITTEN: $650B capex spend across 5 giants, capital gravity thesis, each giant's AI strategy, 'context as leverage' closing. Pending GitHub push + approval.

articles.title: El OS que se Construye Solo
articles.subtitle: Lifestyle OS y el futuro del software personal
articles.summary: Luis's Lifestyle OS vision — software that builds around you, not the other way around. Agentic onboarding, computer-person metric, the process over the product.

articles.title: La Paradoja del Modelo Abierto
articles.subtitle: Open source vs. closed source en la carrera de la IA
articles.summary: La tensión entre open-source y closed-source AI. ¿Está destinado el open-source a siempre ir 6 meses detrás?

articles.title: El Territorio Cambió
articles.summary: REWRITTEN: 280x inference cost drop, GPT-4 training cost data, solo founder stats (36.3%), Midjourney/Pieter Levels examples, Mérida-specific closing. Pending GitHub push.

articles.title: Caballos Salvajes
articles.summary: Origin piece. Pure story voice — Luis's personal narrative. Reviewed, stays as-is. No data treatment needed.

ideas.title: Lifestyle OS / Vibe OS
ideas.summary: Agentic OS that builds itself around you. Onboarding → agents collect data → optimize all life areas. Target: young entrepreneurs, tech-savvy CEOs. Model: build the PROCESS for agents to build your OS, not the software itself. Computer-person metric as the next paradigm.
